node.statement: SCALING-DIAG-001: If a finite operator RG map is diagonal in a chosen scaling basis with diagonal entries lambda_i, then each basis operator is an eigenoperator with eigenvalue lambda_i. Specialising lambda_i to b^(-weight_i) gives the conditional `summary.tex` §11.3 scaling-operator conditional ([[def:scalop]] eigenvalue equation); see also [[def:primary]] for the `h_i`/`Δ_i` weights linear-algebra statement for b^(-h_i) or b^(-Delta_i). This does not derive the CFT weights or assert that a charge-only channel has these eigenvalues. Proven in Lean at Formalisation/LinearAlgebra/DiagonalScaling.lean and checked by Julia/WolframScript.
